## Two-consumer check

Mobile Surfaces follows a two-consumer rule: a new abstraction lands only when two real call sites in this repo need it. If your request adds an abstraction (helper, contract field, adapter slot, config knob), name the two consumers below or explain why it should be an exception.

- Consumer 1:
- Consumer 2:
